data.content:
Implementation complete on branch worktree-knots-bf56-loom-e2e-tests.

Two new end-to-end test files added:
- tests/cli_loom_prompt_resolution.rs (278 lines, 8 tests): CLI regression matrix covering all builtin profiles (autopilot, autopilot_with_pr, semiauto, no-planning variants) across all action states. Validates Loom headings present, no unresolved templates, text/JSON output paths, skill command, and acceptance criteria flow-through. Tests fail with REGRESSION diagnostics if prompts fall back to non-Loom sources.
- tests/cli_loom_profile_output.rs (329 lines, 4 tests): Profile output variant validation. Verifies autopilot resolves remote_main output sections, autopilot_with_pr resolves PR output sections, custom workflow prompts resolve independently, and builtin prompts survive custom workflow installation.

All 12 new tests pass. make sanity green (95.40% coverage >= 95% threshold). No existing tests broken.
